title: Business Costings
context: You run a small food stall. Costs per portion: ingredients £2.30, packaging £0.40, pitch fee £80/day (you sell about 40 portions/day).

questions.question: What is a 'profit margin'?
options: The difference between cost and selling price
questions.answer: The difference between cost and selling price

questions.question: What does 'break even' mean?
options: When total income equals total costs
When you make a big profit
questions.answer: When total income equals total costs

questions.question: What is 'overhead'?
options: Ongoing business costs not tied to one product
questions.answer: Ongoing business costs not tied to one product

questions.question: Cost per portion (ingredients + packaging + pitch share)?
If selling price is £7, profit per portion?
